description: Set up environment: install dependencies and verify baseline builds cleanly
steps: Run npm run lint to confirm no pre-existing lint errors
Run npm run typecheck to confirm type checking passes
Run npm run test to confirm existing tests pass
Run npm run build to confirm build succeeds
verification: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
findings: All steps passed cleanly. npm install completed (1067 packages, 4 audit vulnerabilities - 2 moderate, 2 high - all pre-existing). Lint, typecheck, and tests (202 files, 1173 passed, 22 skipped) all exit 0. Build succeeds with 116 pre-existing warnings about Node.js APIs used in Edge Runtime contexts (process.arch, process.cwd, process.execPath, etc.) - these are warnings only and do not prevent the build from completing.
